authority_boundary: This receipt records a live blocked fan-in boundary plus read-only public-site availability evidence. It does not mutate doctrine source authority, admit a mechanism, append a capsule, regenerate lattice projections, refresh generated site files, or approve release.
anti_claim: Do not count this receipt as a closed paper-module population deficit, fresh public-site build, capsule-authority flip, release approval, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness proof.

paper_module_corpus.classification: All live legacy-only paper modules are still required-subject gaps; no capsule-only conversion is source-honest until a resolving organ or mechanism subject exists.

blocked_shared_surface.owner_current_pass: Repairing the single live mechanism capsule dependency parity deficit from source authority, then regenerating doctrine lattice projections.
blocked_shared_surface.blocking_condition: The next source-backed paper-module population slice requires mechanism admission in core/mechanism_sources.json plus doctrine lattice projection regeneration. Editing core/paper_module_capsules.json alone would either name an unresolved subject or make the full doctrine projection stale.

coordination_request.command: ./repo-python tools/meta/factory/work_ledger.py session-yield-request --target-session-id codex_goal_microcosm_doctrine_lattice_saturation_20260604T103920Z_microcosm_mechanism_parity_edge_repair --target-class settlement_obligation_owner --requested-action release_after_landing --result requested --coordination-brief --requester-label codex_type_a_microcosm_doctrine_population_site_availability --blocked-on "next paper-module population slice requires mechanism_sources.json plus doctrine lattice projection regeneration for source-backed capsule exposure" --validation-status "build_doctrine_projection.py --check passes; mutation-check blocks six shared lattice/mechanism paths" --held-path microcosm-substrate/core/mechanism_sources.json --held-path microcosm-substrate/core/doctrine_lattice_coverage.json --held-path microcosm-substrate/atlas/doctrine_lattice_projection.json --held-path microcosm-substrate/atlas/doctrine_lattice_graph.mmd --held-path microcosm-substrate/atlas/doctrine_lattice_health.json --held-path microcosm-substrate/atlas/doctrine_lattice_entry_card.json

blocked_shared_surface.reentry_condition: After the owner lands or releases the shared mechanism/lattice paths, re-run mutation-check, admit the resolving mechanism or equivalent subject, append only source-warranted capsule rows, regenerate doctrine projections from source, then refresh the public site through the existing builder.

direct_site_write_boundary.reason: Generated site assets already carry unrelated dirty UI/search changes and the builder check reports generated content drift. This pass records a site-ready handoff rather than hand-editing or overwriting generated HTML/JS/CSS.

read_only_availability_audit.command: Read sites/microcosm/assets/object-map.js, sites/microcosm/object-map.json, sites/microcosm/content-graph.json, sites/microcosm/assets/search-index.js, sites/microcosm/assets/site-packet.js, sites/microcosm/docs/paper-modules.html, and sites/microcosm/llms.txt for the 13 legacy-only paper-module ids.
read_only_availability_audit.availability_delta: No generated site files changed in this pass. Current generated data surfaces still expose all 13 residual legacy-only module ids through object-map, content-graph, search-index, and site-packet data; the HTML paper-module doc exposes seven of the thirteen; llms.txt does not enumerate these ids.

site_ready_handoff.expected_next_availability_slice: Once source authority lands, refresh public generated data so capsule-backed status, object-map/content-graph/search entries, paper-module doc rows, and projection-status hashes all reflect current doctrine source without frontend redesign.

task_ledger_bindings.purpose: Captured current public-site generated content drift as an availability residual before closeout.
Captured the initial non-canonical reachability probe path selection and its correction before receipt creation.

forbidden_material_not_included: live command output bodies beyond validation summaries

closeout.next_lane: Re-enter the source population lane after the mechanism/lattice owner releases. If site assets remain dirty, claim the builder outputs or emit a builder-ready payload; do not hand-edit generated site files.
